puzzle.title: The Test of Unwavering Submission
puzzle.intro: A young soul is placed at the heart of an immense trial, a test of faith not just for this individual, but for their devoted parent as well. This moment of profound submission would echo through history, its legacy commemorated by millions. Who is this figure of patience and obedience?
clues: I was left with my mother in a barren valley, a place with no vegetation or water.
In our desperation, a miraculous spring of water gushed forth from the earth to sustain us.
With my father, I raised the foundations of a sacred House, a focal point of worship for all humanity.
My father saw in a dream that he was to sacrifice me, a divine command that tested us both.
When my father told me of his vision, I replied, 'O my father, do as you are commanded. You will find me, if Allah wills, of the steadfast.'
Allah ransomed me with a great sacrifice, and this act of submission is commemorated annually by believers.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Isma'il
Prophet Yahya
Prophet Yusuf
Prophet Ishaq
Qabil

trial.label: The Divine Test
options: A father's vision to sacrifice his son
Building an ark to survive a flood
Being thrown into a fire by a tyrant
Being swallowed by a giant fish
Accusation of theft by one's own siblings
trial.answer: A father's vision to sacrifice his son

location.label: Key Element
options: A spring of water
A staff that turned into a serpent
A feast sent down from the heavens
A camel emerging from a rock
A shirt that healed blindness

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Ransomed with a great sacrifice
The fire became cool and peaceful
The sea parted to create a dry path
Given kingship over a vast domain
Elected as a leader by the people

puzzle.arabic: ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى وَهَبَ لِى عَلَى ٱلْكِبَرِ إِسْمَـٰعِيلَ وَإِسْحَـٰقَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبِّى لَسَمِيعُ ٱلدُّعَآءِ
puzzle.verse: Praise to Allāh, who has granted to me in old age Ishmael and Isaac. Indeed, my Lord is the Hearer of supplication. (14:39)
